title: Stop! In the Name of Love
why_this_song: Stop! In the Name of Love by The Supremes (1965) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Stop! In the name of love
I'm aware of where you go

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "think" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "think" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stop" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stop" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Stop! In the Name of Love" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Stop! In the Name of Love" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Stop! In the Name of Love" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Stop! In the Name of Love"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Supremes one question about "Stop! In the Name of Love", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Supremes sobre "Stop! In the Name of Love", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Stop! In the Name of Love" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Stop! In the Name of Love" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Stop! In the Name of Love", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Stop! In the Name of Love", o que aconteceria?
